prompt: I've got this podcast transcript where Sarah Chen interviews Marcus Rivera about over-engineering data pipelines. Can you make it into a proper article? File: ~/.claude/skills/yt-transcript-to-article-workspace/test-data/interview-podcast.txt

assertions.name: has_attributed_quotes
assertions.description: Contains direct quotes attributed to Marcus Rivera

assertions.name: identifies_speakers
assertions.description: Identifies both Sarah Chen and Marcus Rivera by name

assertions.name: covers_recommended_stack
assertions.description: Mentions the recommended simple stack (postgres/pgvector, OpenAI/Anthropic, Python)

assertions.name: not_qa_format
assertions.description: Not structured as Q&A format - organized by theme instead
